[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110101 5
1 1010111 5
2 1010101 4
3 0111111 6
4 1010111 5
5 0111111 6
6 1111111 a
7 1101001 4

01 1000000 1
12 0111000 3
23 1000110 3
34 0000000 a
45 0101010 3
56 0000000 a
67 0100000 1
70 0001000 1

02 0000000 a
13 0010110 3
24 1000100 2
35 0101000 2
46 0000010 1
57 0000000 a
60 0101000 2
71 1000000 1

03 1000110 3
14 0010100 2
25 0000110 2
36 0000000 a
47 0100010 2
50 0000000 a
61 1000000 1
72 0001000 1

04 1000100 2
15 0111110 5
26 0000010 1
37 0100000 1
40 0101000 2
51 1000000 1
62 0101000 2
73 1000100 2

05 0000110 2
16 0010010 2
27 0000010 1
30 0101000 2
41 0000000 a
52 0000000 a
63 1000100 2
74 1000100 2

75 0001100 2

76 0000000 a
